<?php require(__DIR__.'/../src/Twilio/autoload.php'); use Twilio\Rest\Client; use Twilio\CredentialProvider\OrgsCredentialProviderBuilder; $clientId = getenv('ORGS_CLIENT_ID'); $clientSecret = getenv('ORGS_CLIENT_SECRET'); $orgSid = getenv('ORG_SID'); $orgsCredentialProvider = (new OrgsCredentialProviderBuilder())->setClientId($clientId)->setClientSecret($clientSecret)->build(); $client = new Client(); $client->setCredentialProvider($orgsCredentialProvider); //list users $users = $client->previewIam->organization($orgSid)->users->read(); foreach ($users as $user) { printf("User SID: %s\n", $user->id); }
